entry.title: An Drunken Night
entry.summary:
Author: OnceFutureKing

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 841Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 0

Summary: A party is thrown to celebrate the defeat of Morgana. Merlin gets wasted (he is always at the tavern, isn’t he?) and stumbles into his king’s bedchambers with no plan in mind.

entry.title: There Were Dragons Here Once: Nine
entry.summary:
Author: Saxifactumterritum

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,631Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Arthur now knows about Merlin's magic. Merlin sets himself a task, and sets out to do it. There is afterall still a dragon underneath Camelot. Merlin has a thought to do something about that. There is also a crown prince with opaque motivations doing odd things. Part nine of the adventury au I put the gen tag today, because it is a lot of friends in this part. But it is also Merthur, really.

entry.title: A love time stands still for
entry.summary:
Author: hysterical_light

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,973Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 51

Summary: What if no one is around when Arthur rises from the lake,what if Arthur is left to make his own way, towards the warm feeling guiding his soul.With a knights mindset in the modern world.A fairly sappy warm take on Arthur rising and finding Merlins new life in his little tudor house with his big grey cat

entry.title: Eat the rich
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: The man was exactly like on the photos Gwaine had shown him. Blond with pale blue eyes and a sharp jaw. His smile dug cute dimples in his cheeks. Merlin breathed deeply. In his experience, gorgeous men often had a horrendous personality. But this guy couldn’t be too bad, if he was Gwaine’s friend. “Sorry, I hope I didn’t keep you waiting for too long. I’m Merlin, by the way,” Merlin said with a self-conscious smile and a nervous chuckle. “I arrived just a few minutes ago, Merlin. I’m Arthur.” The way his name rolled off Arthur’s tongue made a shiver run down Merlin’s spine. He wasn’t ashamed of admitting that he really wanted to hear it again. He even found Arthur’s posh accent attractive. Gwen would be cackling when he’d tell her. That was perhaps the first time that Merlin encountered a rich person that he didn’t immediately want to punch.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Never Have I Ever (Or Have I?)
entry.summary:
Author: Skylubee

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,031Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: One months after the ban on magic is lifted, Merlin should finally feel free.Instead, the truth weighs heavier than ever. When Gwaine suggests a camping trip and a drunken game of Never Have I Ever, secrets begin to unravel around the fire. Arthur finally learns the truth.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,371Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 75

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Merlin’s Other Half
entry.summary:
Author: OnceFutureKing

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 527Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: The once and future king is destined to rise again- one thousand and three hundred and twenty five years later a young couple conceives a baby. Merlin has awaited the return of his beloved for over a thousand years, and it has messed with his head. He has given SO MUCH for his king; now that he has him back, he is not taking any chances.

entry.title: Destiny's Hold
entry.summary:
Author: give_me_a_croissant

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,140Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Starting in the middle of S5E5.Arthur is faced with an impossible decision. Accept the old religion back into his kingdom and save Sir Mordred's life, or continue his campaign against sorcery and condemn the young knight to certain death? After receiving advice from Merlin, Arthur decides to do something that will forever change the fate of Camelot, and hopefully his own destiny.ORWhat if Arthur accepted magic back into his kingdom to save Mordred, and then he quickly finds out that Merlin, who has been by his side through all of this, is a sorcerer himself? How does Arthur's decision with the Disir change his and Merlin's destiny?

entry.title: Ashes of Avalon
entry.summary:
Author: StuckatAzkaban

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,917Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Merlin has been reborn into a world that has forgotten magic within the 70s, but when a near fatal accident drags him beneath the black waters of a lake, something ancient awakens. Something waiting. As Merlin sinks toward death, hands reach for him from the darkness below. Arthur. The King who died centuries ago rises from the depths, alive and unchanged, carrying the weight of a past that should have remained forgotten. Two hundred years ago, they made a mistake that was never truly undone, and now an ancient darkness is breaking free, because some mistakes never stay buried. Bound together once more by destiny, Merlin, Arthur and the Knights of the Roundtable uncover the truth of what happened in 1754 and finish a battle they never won. But some secrets were buried for a reason, and the threads of fate are stained by old sins. But first, Merlin has no idea who this blond man is that emerged from the lake, yet he knows everything.

entry.title: For Good
entry.summary:
Author: elevenincamelot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,240Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 239

Summary: Fifteen hundred years. I’m sure it’s been fifteen hundred years because I’ve felt every single moment of it. Every draw of breath, every step on the hard ground, every ounce of stark reality has been obvious to me. I’m not the same as I was. Time has a way of digging deep into your spirit and settling its claws there. And I will wait. I have no choice, but I keep telling myself that wouldn’t matter. It might not matter. Would he even know me? Behind this familiar face is a creature who has lived the lives of hundreds of tortured souls. Does it show? Could he see the desperation there? If I made him look, really look...If he were here, I like to think I could be who I once was. Could feel the release of the claws of time like a weight coming off my chest. I like to think that weight would be erased. That I would be whole again. Have I only changed for the interim? Could that shroud be lifted for good?

entry.title: Two Hearts, Bound by Fate
entry.summary:
Author: Encantus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,111Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin Emerson, a hybrid Labrador/Wolf Therian (or Shifter) leaves his small town in Texas and travels to New Haven, Connecticut to attend Wildwood Academy, one of the most prestigious colleges for Shifters in America. While there he quickly realizes that his destiny is about to catch up with him when he bumps into his mate, purely by accident. He's arrogant, rude, and rich, the exact opposite of Merlin. Oh, and he's a Cat. Merlin will find a depth in Arthur that he isn't expecting, but also something more: a home. Somewhere he truly belongs, where he can be himself. Is this what he was looking for all along? Is this going to last? He certainly hopes it's not some cruel joke of fate.

entry.title: The Scar Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: DILLIGAF_iykyk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,395Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 140

Summary: The bandits came from the tree line like shadows given teeth. Arthur had his sword drawn before the first cry rang out, steel singing free of the scabbard as he pivoted toward the rush of bodies.They were outnumbered—six knights against what looked like twenty men, ragged and desperate, pouring from the dark wood on either side of the forest road.

entry.title: S2: EP 2: EXPOSED ROOTS: THE BOND SERIES
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,134Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Arthur lifted his eyes to the Knight, finally. “Why did you kiss him?” “I already told you. We spoke.” “Of whoring?” “Of choice. And the difference between having one, and having none.” “And he couldn’t come to me,” Arthur sighed sadly. “Not with *that* word in his mind, in his ear. Not knowing the fury it could invoke in you. He didn’t want to hurt you.” “So you kissed him instead, thinking that would hurt less?” Arthur accused harshly. “No, I kissed him so he’d take me seriously. Words weren’t getting me anywhere. The two of you have been fighting this battle for *years*- so they haven’t gotten *you* anywhere, either. I knew it was time to be done with words. And I didn't overly much care at the time how *you* would feel about it. I cared about what *he* needed.” Gwaine chuckled, shaking his head. “He threw me clear across the Garden.”

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,310Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 59

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: The Trial of Uther Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: HerMajestyofLichtenstein

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 139,290Chapters: 83/?Kudos: 2,402

Summary: When Morgana invokes a long forgotten spell, the ancient and powerful Court of Magic is summoned to pass judgment on Uther Pendragon and his bloodline for their crimes against the magical world. But for the verdict to be carried out, every seat on the Council must be filled, and the chair of the Dragonlords has long stood empty. Now Merlin faces an impossible choice: side with his people and end Uther’s reign of terror, or save Arthur. Now combined with The Paper King

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Three Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: gilbertsdoor

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,344Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 162

Summary: No plots, no evil sorcerers, no magical creatures, no call to destiny or twist of fate. No, one day Merlin just decides it’s time to tell Arthur the truth, if Arthur will listen long enough for him to tell it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
